id: attach-google-pay-to-customer

description: "    Attach a Google Pay payment method to a customer in the Account."
sidebar_label: "Attach Google Pay to customer"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Attach Google Pay to customer"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/payment-methods/google-pay/{id}/attach"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



    Attach a Google Pay payment method to a customer in the Account.

    ### Permissions
    * `payment-method:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
